title: Fluorescence imaging enabled poly(lactide-co-glycolide).
author: Hu J Guo J Xie Z Shan D Gerhard E Qian G Yang J
content: S-EPMC4681614 PMC4681614 Fluorescence imaging enabled poly(lactide-co-glycolide). Fluorescent biomaterials have attracted significant research efforts in the past decades. Herein, we report a new series of biodegradable, fluorescence imaging-enabled copolymers, biodegradable photoluminescent poly
